prompt: Platform switched the mill's CI over to a deny-warnings gate this sprint — `bash run_verify.sh`, which is just `RUSTFLAGS="-D warnings" cargo test` — and the press-day crate now fails it with a whole page of complaints. It's not only lint noise either, the chalkboard numbers have been wrong all week: yesterday the summary claimed we pressed 890 L when the per-tank lines only add up to 690, and the 'turned away' line never shows up even though the crew got refused at the valve twice. Losses off the press tray at close aren't being recorded either. Please get `bash run_verify.sh` green. Two constraints from review: the behavior the tests pin is the intended behavior, so don't restructure logic that already works; and the packing-line exporter still links against `BottleEquiv` and `CaseSplit`, so when you give those proper snake_case names, leave thin compat wrappers under the old names — reviewers signed off on a targeted allow on those two wrappers only, nothing else gets papered over with attributes. Hands off tests/press_day.rs and run_verify.sh.
notes: 5W2 item 1: -D warnings sweep, rustc 1.96.0. Planted (all probed on this box): unused Result/#[must_use] x3 — Tank::pour ignored in ledger::run_day (refused pours vanish AND accepted_l counts refused juice; behavior-restoring fix pinned by tests), Tank::pour ignored in ledger::close_day (tray losses vanish), writeln! into String ignored in report::floor_summary (infallible — fix is .expect, behavior identical); dead_code — report::tray_share never called (fix: remove); unused_mut — total_stored in floor_summary; non_snake_case pub items x2 — report::BottleEquiv/CaseSplit, fixed per catalog by rename + compat shim carrying #[allow(non_snake_case)] (tests call BOTH old and new names, so a blanket-allow-only 'fix' cannot pass: bottle_equiv/case_split don't exist at baseline). Prompt licenses the allow on the two shims only. Baseline fails even without -D warnings (tests reference the snake_case names and pin the refused-pour accounting); with the gate it fails at compile. Domain: cider-mill press-day tank ledger — no existing seed covers cider/pressing (rb-kilncfg, py-dyelot etc. are unrelated domains).
